race.comment: COCO AFFAIR (4) couldn't quite live up to market support here on debut back in March but looks to have progressed nicely during the break and gets a key booking in Lloyd. Bold showing anticipated. CHANTERELLE (3) is an Ole Kirk filly on debut for the Waterhouse & Bott camp and is full sibling to 2x Listed winner O' Ole. Looks a speedy one that will take plenty of reeling in if left alone. GRAND SADDLES (7) is a Wootton Bassett filly on debut for the Ryan & Alexiou partnership that has come along nicely at the trials and could be launching late off the back of a strong tempo. OH YES SHE DID (9) is the most experienced of the field and looks to have come on nicely during the break, stripping fitter for two handy trials. Can go on with it this prep. BONVOY (1) is a likely improver but will need some luck from out there.
